queries.question: What risk names are associated with each bank product?
queries.sql: SELECT Risks.RiskName  from Bank_Products_Risks join Risks on Bank_Products_Risks.RiskID = Risks.RiskID join Bank_Products on Bank_Products_Risks.ProductID = Bank_Products.ProductID   GROUP BY Bank_Products_Risks.RiskID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bank_Products_Risks.ProductID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Bank_Products)

queries.question: What risk names are associated with each bank product?
queries.sql: select bank_products.productname , risks.riskname from Bank_Products_Risks join Risks on Bank_Products_Risks.RiskID = Risks.RiskID join Bank_Products on Bank_Products_Risks.ProductID = Bank_Products.ProductID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?productname ?riskname WHERE {
  ?bank_products_risks a :Bank_Products_Risks .
  ?risks a :Risks .
  ?bank_products_risks p:hasRisks ?risks .
  ?bank_products a :Bank_Products .
  ?bank_products_risks p:hasBank_Products ?bank_products .
  ?bank_products p:ProductName ?productname .
  ?risks p:RiskName ?riskname .
}
